vibe: Trust, Growth, Calm, Local Approachability, Lightweight

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Lightweight DOM for low-bandwidth optimization.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D84315] text-white hover:bg-[#BF360C] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-full font-medium px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-[#2E7D32] text-white hover:bg-[#1B5E20] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-full font-medium px-6 py-3
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#E5E0D8] text-[#1A2E22] hover:border-[#D84315] hover:text-[#D84315] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-full font-medium px-6 py-3
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#128C7E] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-full font-medium px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.orange_money: bg-[#FF6600] text-white hover:bg-[#E65C00] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-xl font-bold px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2

cards.listing: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-[#E5E0D8] overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.category: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 text-center border border-[#E5E0D8] hover:border-[#D84315] transition-colors duration-200 cursor-pointer

inputs.text: w-full bg-[#FAF8F5] border border-[#E5E0D8] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#1A2E22] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D84315] focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200 placeholder:text-[#4A5D50]/50

components.navigation: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E5E0D8] sticky top-0 z-50

images.strategy: Optimize for low-bandwidth. Use flat colors where images fail to load. Provide fallback backgrounds.

hero_illustration.description: Warm local marketplace minimalist flat illustration, people trading, Guinean colors.

orange_money_illustration.description: Minimalist vector illustration of mobile money transfer.

category_alimentation.description: Fresh vegetables displayed at a market.

category_vehicules.description: Used cars for sale in lot.

category_mode.description: African fashion, woman in red/white dress.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) for cards, background darkening for buttons.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast ring for accessibility (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D84315] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#FAF8F5]).
motion_and_interactions.low_bandwidth_fallback: Keep animations strictly to CSS transitions. No heavy JS physics libraries.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all images are lazy-loaded with placeholder blur or skeleton loaders since this app targets low-bandwidth regions.
Do NOT use heavy 3D libraries or WebGL.
Use Phosphor icons heavily to replace textual clutter, ensuring clear visual communication.
The UI should feel tactile but flat—avoid massive drop shadows, use 1px solid borders and subtle shadow-sm for depth.
Implement the payment flow using pure HTML/Tailwind styling mimicking Orange Money UI conventions (orange buttons, clear typography).
Never use Inter or Roboto. Apply Outfit for headings and Work Sans for body.
All forms and inputs must have high contrast and clear focus states.
Use Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, dialogs, and tabs, but override styles to match the warm earthy palette.
In the Admin dashboard, use a dense, cardless 'Control Room' grid (Archetype 1 adapted for dashboard) for tracking ads and users.
